title: Phishing Simulator + OpenClaw Engine — Campaign Execution & Results Pipeline
description: test_phishing_simulator.py and test_openclaw_engine.py cluster with siem_engine.py (CEF/LEEF/JSON format output). The phishing simulator manages campaigns and recipients but does not actually send phishing emails — the SMTP delivery step is a stub. OpenClaw pentest swarm is defined but autonomous execution is not wired.
missing: SMTP delivery integration: implement phishing email sender using smtplib with configurable SMTP relay, tracking pixel embedding, and link click tracking
Click/open event receiver: FastAPI endpoint /api/v1/phishing/track/{token} that records opens and clicks in the campaign results DB
OpenClaw autonomous execution: wire openclaw_engine to spawn SwarmClaw agent tasks for each pentest scenario so attacks execute autonomously overnight
